title: JDK's Farming Utilities 2
description: Add ways to automate your farms
body:
##  JDK's Farming Utilities is a mod designed to make farming more enjoyable and efficient by adding new blocks and items 

### Required [JDK's Utilities Core 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/jdk-core) v1.0c

## You can see all the content below ⏬

### - Blocks:
 
Auto Farmer. (collects crops in area)

Moisturizer. (after a while, turn sand into clay or dirt into mud)

Growth Accelerator. (accelerate growth time of plants)

### - Items:
 Watering Can. (3x3 & 5x5 versions)
 
 Soularium Fertilizer. (instantly grows all plants)

### - Modules:

Range Modules. (increases range of machines)

### (Free use for modpacks)
